sourceOfTruth.componentImports: Use website/src/shared/site for neutral site chrome, website/src/shared/ui/primitives/ for governed visual primitives, and feature folders for domain adapters; website/src/components/site.tsx is retired and scanner-blocked.

components.notes: Shared website route/page shell owner for the app-level page-shell wrapper and ordinary page main elements. App route code uses PageShell, page route files use WebsitePageMain unless they need a route-specific shared main such as ClaimFlowMain or HostPreviewMain; raw page-shell wrappers and raw <main> tags are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Route-level story coverage; visible Home route sections live in features/home/sections and are registered below.
Home route hero section with public organizer and host CTAs plus app download placeholders.
Home event discovery renders only future Catch-bookable events in configured live-market cities, with deterministic Storybook event and empty-inventory states.
Home route format-aware positioning section.
Home route organizer-directory preview section using generated host listing cards.
Home route member loop section.
Home route host-tools proof section with product board shell.
Home route app-capture proof section with real and fallback capture states.
Shared app-capture figure shell for Home and Host capture sections; raw capture-card markup is blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared identity display shell primitives for organizer activity marks and status badges. Public organizer profile-strength scores are deliberately not rendered.
Shared process status panel shell for claim review, pending, already-claimed, and missing-listing states; raw process-status-panel markup is blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Home route app-download placeholder section.
Home route trust and safety positioning section.
Home route member waitlist section using shared waitlist and form primitives.

Shared website marketing section shell primitives for Home hero slots, marketing sections, section copy, format cards, configured info-card grids, host comparison summary cards, featured organizer card grids, and live meters; raw marketing section and reveal-article info-card shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website loop-list shell primitive for Home member loop and Host workflow loop; raw loop-list markup, legacy LoopList imports, and local LoopList components are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website consent banner presentation shell used by the app-level marketing consent feature wrapper; raw consent-banner markup is blocked by web:react-component-governance while consent state and analytics choices stay feature-owned.

Shared website app-download CTA group for configured store CTA rows, launch-pending status, button/link selection, store marks, kicker text, and live status. Route sections pass placement, variant, and optional initial status while marketing/useAppDownloadCtas.ts owns telemetry configuration; the deleted feature AppDownloadCtas component, raw app-download classes, and raw store-button shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website featured organizer card-grid primitives for Home featured organizers and listing recommendations; direct FeaturedOrganizersGrid, OrganizerMiniCard, organizer-mini-card, and recommended-organizers shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing shell primitives for listing sections, revealed section intros, internal grid/card building blocks, format rows, diagnostics, base event containers, and review workspaces; raw organizer listing shells and revealed intro wrappers are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing configured card-grid primitives for profile fact cards and fit-note cards; direct ListingGrid and ListingCard composition is blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing event-section primitives for event action cards, configured download panels, and event evidence lists; raw event-action-card shells and direct ListingEventDownload/Stack/Card/Meta/Facts composition are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing source-ledger primitive for source rows, confidence labels, details, and outbound source links; direct ListingLedger composition and raw source-link shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing hero shell primitives for hero shell, inner layout, copy, eyebrow, panel metrics, and share-status slots; raw organizer listing hero shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing review shell primitives for review signal lanes/cards, owner-response prompts, empty review state, public review form, and anonymous checkbox slots; raw organizer listing review shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer search result-card shell primitives for result cards, card body, topline metadata, event highlights, and footer status; raw organizer result-card shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Reference route-first host page composition.
Host route hero section; route-level composition imports this section instead of owning hero/product markup.
Host route evidence section backed by shared EvidenceStrip.
Host route workflow loop section.
Host route platform-surface section.
Host route fill-room product module section.
Host route live facilitation module section.
Host route confidence/proof ledger section.
Host route app-capture section.
Host route application section wrapper around HostApplicationFlow.
Reference organizer-directory route story; URL state remains controller-owned through React Router search params.
Generated organizer listing route story uses a checked hostListings fixture and the website Query provider because reviews and claim panels are query-backed.
Thin organizer listing route-section assembler; visible child sections own Storybook coverage.

Interactive host create-flow section shared by /host/ and /host/preview/; configures shared scanner-enforced Host feature section and phone-capture shell primitives instead of rendering raw section shells.
Canonical host Playbook stage rail and semantic module catalog with deep-link and interaction coverage.
Interactive comparison table section shared by both host routes; configures shared scanner-enforced Host feature section and comparison table shells instead of rendering raw section shells.

Initial flow coverage only; fixed submitted/error states need a later controller seam. HostApplicationFlow configures shared scanner-enforced host application shell primitives instead of rendering raw flow shells.

Claim route story wraps the route in the website Query provider because submission owns a TanStack Query mutation. Direct links to listings without a verified claim target render claim-unavailable instead of collecting a packet that cannot be submitted.
Scanner-enforced document, header, label, sections, and contact shells for the three published legal routes.
Shared published legal and support document route with route-specific content, metadata, and static crawlable output.
Noindex not-found route story for fallback routes and static 404 output.
Claim route hero and selected-listing summary section.
Claim lookup state section for already-claimed, pending, and not-found claim URLs.
Claim route form workspace section; Storybook uses a mock controller so auth and Firebase side effects stay route-owned.

Shared website claim-flow shell primitives for the /claim/ route root, hero, workspace, panel, stage, listing results, listing cards, verification grid, owner unlock board, and AuthStatusRow variants; raw claim-flow route/root/auth-row shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website UI label primitive for the uppercase eyebrow/metadata label treatment used across route sections and legacy website display components; raw ui-label spans are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website field-layout primitive used by host and claim flows; raw flow-field-grid containers are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website operational step rail primitive used by host application and claim flows; raw operational-step-rail shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website choice chip and chip-grid primitives used by host application and claim flows; raw choice-chip and choice-chip-grid shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared explanatory choice-card primitive used by host application and claim verification flows; raw choice-card shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website EmptyState shell with named variants for home discovery, claim lookup, organizer search results, review-signal lanes, and listing reviews; raw website empty-state containers or feature-level empty-state shell classes are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website polite live-region status primitive used by app-download CTAs, listing share feedback, and form statuses; raw website live-status shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website lazy route fallback primitive for the route shell; raw route-loading shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website organizer/listing status badge primitive; raw status-badge shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website review-source/verification badge primitive; raw review-signal-badge shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website compact listing badge row primitive for generated organizer cards and heroes; raw listing-badge-row shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website search-form shell, PublicSearchBar composed primitive with internal PublicSearch* slots, and PublicEventCard for public and organizer discovery; raw public-search, direct public-search slot composition, public-event-card, and organizer-search-form shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website organizer filter rail primitive for directory filters; raw organizer-filter-rail shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website section-heading primitive for route and section headings; raw section-heading shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website action-group primitive for hero, flow, and host-create-flow action wrappers; raw flow-actions, hero__actions, and host-create-flow__actions shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website label/value control-row primitive for product-board style control summaries; raw control-row shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website waitlist/application section primitive for member waitlist and host application shells; raw waitlist-section and waitlist__intro shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website waitlist form presentation shell used by the waitlist feature controller wrapper; raw waitlist-form class composition is blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared website Event Success module grid primitive for host showcase modules; raw event-success-module-grid shells and direct SuccessGrid composition are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing Event Success metric-grid primitive for generated listing aggregate outcomes; raw listing-success-grid shells and direct SuccessGrid composition are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website claim-band/request-panel shell primitives for generated organizer listing claim states; raw claim-band, claim-band__grid, claim-band__rail, claim-request-panel, and claim-request-panel__heading shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website organizer listing claim shell primitives for missing-evidence lists and claim request forms; raw missing-list and claim-request-form shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website content grid primitive for format, trust, public event, host surface, listing event, and claim review grids, including configured MarketingInfoCardGrid usage for trust and surface cards; raw format-grid, trust-grid, public-event-grid, surface-grid, listing-catch-event-grid, and claim-review-grid shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website panel shell primitive for hero panels, event-ticket shells, generated listing panels, and claim unlock panels; raw hero-panel, event-ticket, event-ticket__status, event-ticket__meta, listing-panel, and claim-unlocks shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website product shell primitives for product-board, host-console, module-stack, product-module-grid/card, and host create-flow mock shells; raw product-board, host-console, module-stack, product-module-grid/card, host-create-flow__mock, mock-window__bar, and related product shell slots are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared website row/list shell primitives for host evidence strips, proof ledger rows, and featured organizer CTA panels; raw evidence-strip, proof-ledger__rows, and featured-organizers__cta shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared Host Page shell primitives for the host hero, hero inner/copy slots, host page section variants, and host capture-grid modifier; raw Host Page route shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared Host Application shell primitives for the application form shell, panel, stage, submitted state, review cards, operational note, and completeness summary; raw host-application shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Shared Host feature section shell primitives for host create-flow, Event Success showcase, comparison split/table, privacy guardrail, and phone capture frames; raw host feature section shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.
Shared legacy-named host offer, trust, and FAQ shell primitives retained by the canonical host route pending the mechanical primitive-family split.

Shared organizer search section shell primitives for the organizer search hero, stats, result summary, claim-pressure strip, claim list/CTA, and results section; raw organizer search section shells are blocked by web:react-component-governance.

Search/filter hero section backed by the organizer directory URL-state controller; configures shared scanner-enforced organizer search section shell primitives instead of rendering raw section shells.
Directory-level claim CTA strip for unclaimed organizer profiles; configures shared scanner-enforced organizer search section shell primitives instead of rendering raw section shells.
Organizer result-list section including empty state coverage; configures shared scanner-enforced organizer search section shell primitives instead of rendering raw section shells.
Generated listing hero with claim, save, share, identity, and source-backed diagnostics; public profile-strength scores are deliberately omitted.
Generated listing fact grid for both unclaimed and app-created profile shapes.
App-created generated listing event section backed by Catch event supply.

Query-backed generated listing reviews section; Storybook coverage wraps it in the website Query provider. Configures shared scanner-enforced listing review shell primitives instead of rendering raw review signal, owner-response, or review form shells.
App-created generated listing Event Success aggregate section.
Generated listing fit notes for unclaimed and app-created profile positioning.
Generated unclaimed listing source-ledger section.
Generated unclaimed listing missing-evidence and embedded claim panel section; Storybook coverage wraps it in the website Query provider.
Generated unclaimed listing recommendation section pointing toward verified organizer profiles.
Feature adapter that binds capture ids and fallback copy to the shared CaptureCard primitive for host/home marketing sections. Visual shell ownership stays in shared_capture_card_shell.
Feature adapter that binds capture ids, fallback screenshots, and alt/caption copy to the shared PhoneCaptureShell primitive. Visual shell ownership stays in shared UI primitives.
App-level adapter that binds analytics consent state to the shared MarketingConsentBannerShell primitive.
Domain adapter that derives organizer activity copy from HostListing data and delegates rendering to the shared ActivityMark primitive.
Domain adapter that maps HostListing claim/source state to the shared StatusBadge primitive tone and copy.
Conditional listing route section for read-only external event evidence. It reuses shared ListingSection, ContentGrid, and EventActionCard primitives.
Conditional listing route section for public event evidence rows. Visual row ownership stays in shared ListingEventEvidenceList.
Feature flow adapter that binds waitlist form state and city/role options to shared form primitives and WaitlistFormShell.
Canonical host supporting section migrated from the retired preview route.
Canonical host supporting section migrated from the retired preview route.
Canonical host supporting section migrated from the retired preview route.
